PASOLIBRE

Who We Are

A movement that builds community.

Pasolibre is a collective that promotes the wellbeing of LGBTQ+ in Puerto Rico through programs and resources focused on physical, mental, professional, and educational wellbeing.

Our community

We create space for every identity, experience, and voice.

We celebrate a community that is diverse, inclusive, and deeply human. These words do not limit people; they help make visible the communities we serve and uplift.

PURPOSE

mission

We promote the physical, emotional, and community wellbeing of LGBTQ+ people in Puerto Rico through movement, education, and safe spaces.

vision

We dream of a community where all LGBTQ+ people have access to safe spaces and tools to work on their own and collective wellbeing.

our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇our story⌇

Pasolibre was born from a shared need within our community: to find a space where we could move, learn, and connect without fear, without judgment, and with a sense of belonging.

Over time, we came to understand that the well-being we were seeking went far beyond exercise. We wanted spaces to talk, learn, laugh, heal, and build community.

Each activity, from a Running Club to a Movie Night, has been born from the desire to create something we often don’t find elsewhere: a space created by and for LGBTQ+ people, accessible, affirming, and full of support.

Today, Pasolibre continues to grow thanks to the collective energy of those who take part. We are not just a program or a calendar of activities; we are a community that supports one another, cares for each other, and moves together toward more complete, personal, and collective well-being.

COMMUNITY

Paso Libre

how we build community

Paso Libre creates spaces where LGBTQ+ people in Puerto Rico can move, learn, connect, and care for one another.
